title: Complete onboarding intake end-to-end and reach diagnostic report on dashboard
description: Verifies a first-time user can complete all 4 intake steps including required resume upload, then finishes processing and sees the diagnostic report on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the sign-up form
Proceed from the onboarding welcome screen
Fill a target role into the target role field
Fill a target city into the target city field
Select a seniority level
Select an industry
Submit the step to advance
Select a job search timeline
Fill an applications count into the applications count field
Select at least one channel used
Submit the step to advance
Select a response pattern
Fill a perceived blocker description into the blocker field
Submit the step to advance
Upload a valid resume file
Submit the intake
Wait for the processing screen to complete
Verify a diagnostic report is displayed on the dashboard

title: Log in with email and password and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in using email/password and is taken to the dashboard on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

Select at least one channel used
Submit the step to advance
Select a response pattern
Fill a perceived blocker description into the blocker field
Submit the step to advance
Upload a valid resume file
Submit the intake
Wait for the processing screen to complete
Verify a diagnostic report is displayed on the dashboard

steps.description: Navigate to /auth

Verify the onboarding intake welcome is displayed

title: Run match analysis from dashboard and view score and ranked achievements
description: Verifies that submitting a pasted job description from the dashboard produces a visible match score and ranked achievements.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the match engine area
Fill a job description into the match engine input
Submit analysis
Verify an overall match score percentage is displayed
Verify a ranked achievements list with strength labels is displayed

title: Onboarding prevents submission without required resume and allows submission after upload
description: Verifies the intake cannot be submitted without a resume, and after uploading a resume the user can submit and reach processing.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth

Fill an applications count into the applications count field
Select at least one channel used
Submit the step to advance
Select a response pattern
Fill a perceived blocker description into the blocker field
Submit the step to advance
Attempt to submit the intake without uploading a resume
Upload a valid resume file
Submit the intake
Verify the full-screen processing screen is displayed

Submit the login form

Verify an overall match score percentage is displayed
Verify ranked achievements are displayed with STRONG, MODERATE, or WEAK labels
